query:

UNION ALL
SELECT 'playlists', userId, COUNT(*) FROM playlists WHERE userId IN (5730001, 34620001) GROUP BY userId
UNION ALL
SELECT 'frequency_profiles', userId, COUNT(*) FROM frequency_profiles WHERE userId IN (5730001, 34620001) GROUP BY userId;
